caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Ocho Rios Port Today
caribbean.paragraph: Ocho Rios in the Western Caribbean is experiencing sustained winds up to 15 knots with wave heights reaching 5.4 feet from the east and a high 90 percent chance of rain. Nearby Nassau is seeing stronger winds up to 25 knots, but less precipitation, indicating localized heavy rain as the main weather concern for the region today.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Waves Affect Mediterranean Ports Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing moderate southerly winds at 20 knots with wave heights reaching 3.8 feet and a swell period of 5 seconds. Rain chances are near 48 percent, while Cadiz is seeing slightly stronger winds at 22 knots but calmer seas.
